creator: freebsd@shotmail.ru
text:
The link to atlantic.net is https:// this has been giving a unable to connect error for months. The non ssl seems to talk about singing no longer mentions any hosting or FreeBSD related info on the site. I think it should be removed? if there are doubt then removing the https:// and adding http:// to make the web site resolve would be a quick fix.

Possibly adding the links to a distilator site to check if they are dead or not and then send x emails?

I feel having dead links gives a sort of bad image such as poorly maintained site etc.. this is what I think I know you guys do your best to keep the site as precise as possible.
